project_type: HTML5 Tower Defense game using ES modules
build_system: None - static files served by browser
test_command: for f in src/*.js game.js; do node --input-type=module --check < "$f"; done
verification_instructions: Run node --input-type=module --check on all .js files to confirm no syntax errors when parsed as ES modules. Note: plain 'node --check' does NOT detect module-level syntax errors.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - static HTML/JS files
environment_constraints: Browser-based game - no server-side runtime. Validation must use node --input-type=module --check to properly detect module syntax errors.
contribution_requirements: Commit changes after fixing, do not push.
key_patterns: Dynamic import() used to break circular deps between ui.js<->levels.js and map.js<->ui.js. All modules use ES module syntax (import/export). game.js is the entry point loaded by index.html with type=module.
directory_structure: Root: game.js (entry), index.html. src/: constants.js, state.js, map.js, audio.js, enemies.js, towers.js, renderer.js, input.js, ui.js, levels.js, save.js, stats.js
